title: Cobblemon: Create & Cultivate
description: A small modpack that integrates Cobblemon, Create and Farmer's Delight, with a few extras.
body:
**Cobblemon: Create & Cultivate** is a small modpack that integrates Cobblemon, Create and Farmer's Delight.
NeoForge only, as Create does not have a Fabric version for 1.21.1 yet.

The aim is for this pack is to be as light as possible and easy to set up as a server.

**Note for servers:** This should also work as a server-side modpack. There's nothing that needs extensive server-side configuration here.
